title: Support SystemC 3.0.0 public review version (#4805)
body:
Closes #4805

It supports tracing with SystemC's new stage callback.

Not sure why t_var_sc_bv fails with SystemC 3.0.0, will have a look later.

```
$ test_regress/obj_vlt/t_var_sc_bv/Vt_var_sc_bv
        SystemC 3.0.0_pub_rev_20231124-Accellera
        Copyright (c) 1996-2023 by all Contributors,
        ALL RIGHTS RESERVED
free(): invalid pointer
```
